summary: Created 12-phase implementation plan for completing the modal cube Hilbert proof systems (10 remaining logics: B, K4, K5, K45, D4, D5, D45, DB, TB, KB5). Phase 1 builds shared infrastructure (canonical_symm, canonical_eucl_from_5, tag types, axiom predicates, instances). Phases 2-11 implement soundness+completeness for each logic in dependency waves. Phase 12 integrates and verifies.

artifacts.summary: 12-phase plan covering shared infrastructure, 10 soundness/completeness pairs, and integration (16 hours estimated)
